creator: tsoome@me.com
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #44)

Unfortunately, with those legacy cases, we really can not fix it just by reading and changing the code -- we need to understand under which conditions the problem is appearing and then figure how to fix it. Meaning, debug printouts need to be inserted and it is long cycle of tests.... and unfortunately, those tests need to be performed on that specific hardware. At the end of the day, it is question if we want to invest time debugging BIOS code while UEFI version is working:)
